title: daphne scopoliana
intro: Daphne scopoliana, also known as the Butterfly Daphne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thymelaeaceae, characterized by its clusters of small, white flowers with a distinctive fragrance. The medicinal properties of Daphne scopoliana are attributed to its alkaloid compounds, including scopolamine and hyoscyamine, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits associated with Daphne scopoliana include its potential to reduce anxiety, alleviate pain, and improve sleep quality, although it is essential to note that its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional due to its potential side effects. Daphne scopoliana is traditionally prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and its herbal preparations are often used in aromatherapy and homeopathic medicine.
